title: Per-page SEO frontmatter sub-tree (CMS v2 wave v2-8)
description: Typed seo: sub-tree under page frontmatter. Consumed by templates/_partials/head.html and the editor's SEO tab.

meta_description.description: Meta description for search engines. Best practice: <=155 chars; the editor warns above that threshold but the schema permits up to 320.

title.description: Open Graph title; falls back to page title if empty.

description.description: Open Graph description; falls back to meta_description if empty.

image.description: Open Graph card image; falls back to /static/img/cover.jpg.

schema_type.description: schema.org @type for the page; emitted as JSON-LD in the head.

robots.description: Robots directive. Default omitted (treated as index,follow).
